text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Hey, yeah! If we avoid speaking to each
other until our race, the tension will build
and build… and that'll make our competition
feel even fiercer!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Exactly! It's all about starting with the
right mindset. Ready? Starting… now!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Ahahaha! I can't do it! I don't know if it's
tension or what, but it just feels too weird!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Right — we do share a room, after all. Not saying a single word might be pushing it… Though on the other hand, the strain could make for a good ab workout.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Hehe! You know, I think we'll just have to ——

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
—— put it all on the table once we step onto
the turf! That matches our style the best!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: But I'm going to win it, Ryan!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Just try to outrun me, Ines!
